name: 文献检索与下载全流程
description: End-to-end academic literature search and download automation. When users ask to search literature, download papers, find academic resources, or mention phrases like help me find literature, download this paper, or I need a paper, this skill triggers. Complete workflow: search → recommend → multi-channel download → Ablesci help posting → cron monitoring → notification → progress tracking.

env.name: LIT_PROGRESS_FILE
env.description: 下载进度追踪文件路径

env.name: LIT_NOTIFY_CHANNEL
env.description: 通知渠道（如 wechat-access、telegram 等）
